response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong technical breadth and 20 years of engineering experience, they lack the core executive qualifications for this CTO role. Most critically: no demonstrated track record scaling engineering teams (the role requires 10-30+ people), minimal fintech infrastructure experience, and recent (approximately 1 year) entry into agentic AI work rather than the demonstrated production operating experience required. The resume shows primarily individual-contributor roles with no evidence of building technical leadership layers or governing hybrid engineering models.
strengths: 20 years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with exposure to high-scale infrastructure
Recent direct involvement with MCP and agentic frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates awareness of current AI agent patterns
Proven ability to design and build distributed systems handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby) and event-driven platforms (GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of senior technical leadership scaling teams—the role requires building teams from 10-30+ people and developing internal leadership layers; resume shows individual-contributor roles throughout
Minimal fintech infrastructure experience; only brief mention of RIDE Capital without demonstrated depth in credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance

Approximately 1 year of involvement with agentic frameworks (at re:cinq since April 2025) versus the hard requirement for demonstrated production experience building and operating multi-agent AI systems at scale
